what: Warm A/B of branch perf/eagle-serial-path vs master on a scattered 6x RTX-5090 EU ring, EAGLE reasoning-hybrid, honest_bench (reasoning ON, K=8 depth=4)

ring.order: Czechia(head,L0-10) -> UnitedKingdom(10-20) -> Czechia(20-30) -> Hungary(30-40) -> Germany(40-51) -> Denmark(51-62)
ring.note: rental-lottery order (NOT topology-optimized); all arms on the SAME ring so the comparison is internal; ring showed large per-warm WAN jitter (code-edit prefill swung 8.8s..66s across cycles)

B1_branch_minmatch.note: M25_NGRAM_MINMATCH=1; within the master-branch noise band on a single pass -> UNPROVEN either way

B2_branch_fp8aux.note: M25_FP8_AUX=1; low tok/s is a BAD-JITTER warm cycle (code-edit prefill 47.8s), NOT fp8-aux; accept identical to B0 (14/13/24/43/44) => fp8-aux is QUALITY-SAFE

verdict.serial_path_win: JITTER-ROBUST +33% decode-weighted (master mean 4.3 -> branch mean 5.7); both orderings agree branch>master (fwd 4.0->5.9, rev 4.6->5.5). Accept identical M-vs-branch on all cells except rag-quote => pure per-traversal latency recovery (drafter O(ctx)->O(1) + cancel), as the CPU bench predicted.
verdict.accept_win: REPRODUCIBLE accept lift on long-context-QUOTE (rag-quote 13% -> 44%, g 2.0 -> 4.5, tok/s ~4 -> ~10.5) across BOTH branch passes; the whole-prompt EAGLE-context fix landing on exactly the category it targets (old code fed the drafter only the last 512-tok prefill chunk).
verdict.fp8_aux: QUALITY-SAFE (accept unchanged vs B0); tok/s effect unmeasurable tonight due to jitter. Keep as default under M25_FP8_WIRE.
verdict.min_match: UNPROVEN on one pass (lost in jitter); needs a within-run A/B before trusting the default. Keeping default on but flagged.
verdict.merge: MERGE-WORTHY on the serial-path + rag-quote wins. Push pending leyten go (condition 'concrete swarm-ring results' now met).

method: phase0/m25_scatter_pipe.py --warm-only (worktree-safe REPO pushes branch vs master code per arm) then research/m25_honest_bench.py as the sole coordinator on the head; re-warm between every arm.
